package.name: chess_interfaces
package.description:
Custom ROS 2 message, service, and action interfaces for the chess robot system.
Messages: GameState — full game state for the coordinator PickPlaceTask — single pick-and-place task from move_translator
Services: GetSquarePose — algebraic square → world-frame PoseStamped GetGraveyardPose — color + slot → world-frame PoseStamped WorldToSquare — world (x,y) → algebraic square
Actions: PickPlace — arm controller pick-and-place execution GraspPlanning — grasp planner pose generation
